title: Register/modify tutor user
description: The system shall allow the registration and modification of tutor-user personal data (name email password phone).
source: Stakeholder interviews (guardian G01); literature (Vettivel et al. 2018)
verification_criteria: A tutor with valid data can register within 60 s and edit any field successfully; the mobile app confirms with an on-screen message.

title: Register/modify child data
description: The mobile application shall allow the tutor user to register and modify the child's data (name age school grade photo).
verification_criteria: A registered tutor can add up to 5 children and modify each field; the back-end persists the data.

title: Configure allowed objects
description: The mobile application shall allow the tutor user to enable or disable the objects permitted in the study area (desk).
verification_criteria: For a selected child the tutor can enable or disable at least 8 pre-defined object categories; the IoT device receives the updated list within 5 s.

title: Real-time distraction monitoring
description: The system shall monitor in real time the child's presence facial expressions drowsiness state and the use of non-permitted objects (distractors) in the study area.
source: Stakeholder interviews; literature (Pabba & Kumar 2022 Vettivel et al. 2018)
verification_criteria: For a controlled 30-min session the IoT device detects the four distraction parameters with the latencies reported in Table 6 of the manuscript.

title: Distraction history
description: The mobile application shall display the monitoring history of the child's distraction parameters.
verification_criteria: The tutor sees a chronological list of the last 30 days of events for each child paginated 20 items per page.

title: Alarm and LED alerts
description: The IoT device shall play an alarm sound and activate an LED indicator when the child leaves the study area or shows signs of drowsiness.
verification_criteria: For 20 induced drowsiness events and 20 induced abandonment events the buzzer and LED activate within 1 s; the tutor's app receives the notification.

title: Statistical event graphs
description: The mobile application shall generate statistical graphs of the events detected (drowsiness states use of restricted objects and facial expressions) covering the last seven days from a user-selected date.
verification_criteria: For a valid date the app renders a bar chart per event category with counts per day; export as PNG or CSV.
